title: Japan’s Power Prices Soar to 3.5-Year High
summary: Japan’s day-ahead spot electricity prices surged on Wednesday to the highest level in three and a half years as soaring fuel costs, heat waves, and a weakening Japanese currency have combined to push power prices higher this summer. title: The best farm sims and games like Stardew Valley
summary: Games like Stardew Valley have fully taken root on PC, so now we're thoroughly spoiled for choice on new games to plant parsnips in.
body: The best games like Stardew Valley (Image credit: NPC Studio, composite by PC Gamer) Fields of Mistria Why : The level of heart and detail in the character dialogue is unmatched. Fields of Mistria ❤️ Romance : Yes ⚔️ Combat : Yes 🤝 Co-op : No After two years of early access and an imminent 1.0 launch, Fields of Mistria has become my absolute favorite in the post-Stardew farm sim scene. It solves so many of my little farm simming gripes with little quality-of-life touches and just feels like it was made with a deep love of the genre. Mistria commits so hard to the '90s anime and Game Boy Advance aesthetic with pastel colors and a bunch of loveable cuties wearing capes and shoulder pads. I can't stress enough that it's got so much substance underneath that anime trope crust, though. Yes March is a textbook tsundere and Juniper is a witch who says "OH HO HO" with that arrogant hand pose when she laughs, but it leaves room for characters who defy stereotypes too. Mistria has so much detailed, character-building dialogue that I truly love getting to know its characters and their quirks. (Image credit: Soda Den, composite by PC Gamer) Roots of Pacha Why : It's the best exactly-like-Sta…
